_comment: Education-feeds catalog (L7). A tiered address book of trusted feeds the self-updater harvests. Authoritative-first: only tier 'canonical' / authority 'primary' confirms a change; 'news_teacher_student' is curated secondary news on issues affecting teachers/students; the 'product_updates' layer (edtech/vendor) is OFF by default. Every feed is notated with category/authority/tier/purpose so the updater can prioritize and the curator (L8, tools/seed_curator.py) can keep it accurate. URLs marked verified:false are confirmed PAGE URLs whose RSS/Atom endpoint must be discovered + human-approved (seed_curator.py --discover-from) — type:page entries are discovery targets, not yet harvestable, and no RSS endpoint is ever fabricated. Standards/program changes are advisory + human-verified.

product_updates.note: edtech/vendor product-update feeds — OFF unless a teacher opts in

feeds.label: Florida DOE — newsroom
feeds.purpose: Florida DOE program/policy announcements (state canonical source)

feeds.label: Orange County Public Schools — newsroom
feeds.purpose: OCPS (district 48, Orange County FL) official district news/announcements affecting teachers and students
feeds.note: Finalsite site; RSS endpoint to be discovered + human-approved before harvest

feeds.label: Monarch Learning Academy — school news
feeds.purpose: Monarch Learning Academy (private PK-8 Christian school, College Park / Orlando FL, 1914 Edgewater Dr) school news and calendar — first private-school example
feeds.note: private school; secondary authority — never a canonical change. RSS/calendar feed to be discovered + human-approved
